Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3130, Lot 36097 — Ancients
Constantius II, as Augustus (AD 337-361). AV solidus (22mm, 4.46 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Nicomedia, 6th officina, AD 355-361. D N CONSTAN-TIVS P F AVG, pearl-diademed head of Constantius
sales.description:
Ancients
Constantius II, as Augustus (AD 337-361). AV solidus (22mm, 4.46 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Nicomedia, 6th officina, AD 355-361. D N CONSTAN-TIVS P F AVG, pearl-diademed head of Constantius II right / GLORIA-REI-PVBLICAE, Roma seated facing (on left), spear in left hand, and Constantinopolis seated half-left (on right), foot on prow, scepter in left hand, both supporting with right hand wreath between them inscribed VOT / XXXX in two lines; SMNS in exergue. RIC VIII 100.  www.HA.com/...

sales.description:
Ancients
Magnus Maximus, Western Roman Empire (AD 383-388). AV solidus (22mm, 4.42 gm, 1h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Trier, ca. AD 383-384.
